indicators.name: long wooden table
indicators.rationale: The long wooden table occupies a significant portion of the floor space, leaving little room for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: white chairs
indicators.rationale: The white chairs are arranged around the table, blocking access to the floor space needed for yoga.

indicators.name: lack of open floor area
indicators.rationale: There is no unobstructed floor area available for yoga mat placement.

indicators.name: no yoga mat visible
indicators.rationale: No yoga mat is present, which is essential for yoga practice.

indicators.name: no natural light visible
indicators.rationale: The lighting appears artificial, which may not be suitable for the calming atmosphere needed for yoga.

reasoning_summary: This indoor scene is poorly suited for yoga due to the presence of a long wooden table and white chairs that occupy most of the floor space, leaving no open area for a yoga mat. The lack of natural light and the absence of a yoga mat further contribute to the low suitability score.
